_comment: Town population as data (WORLD_NPCS). look = ProtoPuppet.SURVIVORS key.
_archetypes_comment: Full NPC templates folded onto ProtoNPC.ARCHETYPES at boot. These add the mechanic/medic hires (Hazel/Mercer) whose CREW rows already existed but had no archetype to be hired FROM.

archetypes.name: Hazel
archetypes.title: MECHANIC — 60 SCRIP
archetypes.greet: Hazel: 'Sixty scrip and your rig stops dying on you.'
archetypes.refuse: Hazel: 'I fix rigs, not whatever mess you are.'

archetypes.name: Mercer
archetypes.title: MEDIC — 60 SCRIP
archetypes.greet: Mercer: 'Sixty scrip. I keep you breathing; you keep me alive.'
